user.title: Axium Amplifier
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Axium amplifier. Commands are sent over Ethernet to TCP port 17037. All of the amplifier's zones are added automatically; you can rename them afterwards.

reconfigure.title: Axium Amplifier
reconfigure.description: Rename the hub or update the address the integration uses to reach it (TCP 17037). The whole stack is reached over one connection, so there is a single host/port. Use this if the amplifier's IP address or port changed — your zones, sources and settings are kept. Each amp is a separate device you can rename and configure from its own device page.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Check the host and port (Axium uses TCP 17037).
error.no_amplifier: Connected, but no Axium amplifier responded at this address. Check that this is an Axium device and that it is powered on.

settings.title: Advanced settings
settings.description:
Advanced settings add level/gain controls that can drive the amplifier hard. Enable only if you understand the risks:

- **Source gain** (0–18 dB): can clip the analogue input on AX‑400/800 amplifiers (including the AX‑800DAV), which may stress the amplifier and speakers.
- **Zone gain** (−12…+12 dB): boosts a zone's level; high values can be very loud.
- **Power‑on volume**: sets how loud a zone starts — a high value is a loud surprise on power‑up.

Raise these gradually and watch the Clipping sensor. Turning this off removes the controls again.

add_preset.title: Add a zone preset
add_preset.description: A preset is a named set of zones. On a source card you can pick a preset to start that source playing in exactly those zones. Adding a preset with an existing name replaces it.

add_alarm.title: Add a wake-to-music alarm
add_alarm.description: At the set time the chosen zones power on, switch to the chosen source and gently fade up to the target volume. Pick the weekdays it should run (all by default). Adding an alarm with an existing name replaces it. Arm/disarm all alarms with the Alarms switch on the amplifier device.

error.preset_name_required: Enter a name for the preset.
error.preset_zones_required: Select at least one zone for the preset.
error.alarm_name_required: Enter a name for the alarm.
error.alarm_zones_required: Select at least one zone for the alarm.

abort.no_presets: There are no presets to remove yet.
abort.no_alarms: There are no alarms to remove yet.
